meta.title: Royaume du Bien-Être — Natural Moroccan Cosmetics
meta.description: Discover our artisanal natural skincare from Morocco. Oils, creams, gift sets and hair care, 100% natural. Fast delivery to Belgium and France.

hero.title: Reveal Your Natural Glow
hero.subtitle: Skincare inspired by Moroccan beauty rituals. Ancestral treasures, handcrafted with pure and natural ingredients.

featured.title: Our Must-Haves
featured.subtitle: Discover the essence of our expertise through our iconic products

process.title: Our Quality Commitment
process.subtitle: From Moroccan fields to your skin
process.step1_desc: Our ingredients are hand-picked from the purest Moroccan terroirs.
process.step2_desc: Each product is made following ancestral Moroccan recipes passed down through generations.
process.step3_desc: Rigorous testing to guarantee the purity and effectiveness of every product.
process.step4_desc: Eco-friendly packaging and fast delivery throughout Belgium and France.

story.title: The Essence of Natural Beauty
story.subtitle: Since 2025
story.text: Royaume du Bien-Être was born from a true passion: sharing the natural treasures of Morocco. Authenticity and the pursuit of natural beauty are the values we wish to convey through our shop.
